bio.intro: I am Swanand and I code.
bio.description:
I am a Backend Engineer at Fetch, building the invisible magic behind seamless user experiences. Previously I was an iOS Developer at TikTok in San Jose, where I shipped features used by over a billion users — including real-time compliance channels, cross-platform keyword filtering, and the global Donations feature.

I hold a Master of Science in Computer Science from Arizona State University (GPA 4.0) and have industry experience spanning iOS, Android, and backend development across TikTok, Privoro, and HSBC.

If you are looking for someone who builds scalable, high-quality software, feel free to reach out.

Have a great day!!
